responses: With integrity and consistency -- your credits are piling up.
Reach out your hand today to support others who need you.

Courage is not the absence of fear; it is the conquest of it.
Wise man seldom talks.
If you have a job without aggravations, you don't have a job.

Don't put off till tomorrow what can be enjoyed today.

Calamity is the touchstone of a brave mind.
Everything you add to the truth subtracts from the truth.

Commitment is the stuff character is made of; the power to change the face of things.

To be eighty years young is more cheerful and hopeful than forty years old.
A person is not wise simply because one talks a lot.
It takes guts to get out of the ruts.

Everyone needs to be loved, especially those who do not deserve it.

Don't build your happiness on other's sorrow.

There's no point to being grown up if you can't be childish sometimes.

You can't have everything... where would you put it all?

Keep your feet on the ground even though friends flatter you.

Action is worry's worst enemy.

Let compassion guide your wishes.

Home is where your heart is.
A huge fortune at home is not as good as money in use.

TEAMS - Together Everyone Achieves More Success.
You have a heart of gold.
Life to you is a bold and dashing responsibility.
Want to learn how to love? Start with the one you hate.
There is beauty in simplicity.
Learning is a treasure which accompanies us everywhere.
It is much easier to be critical than to be correct.

There are no stupid questions, just stupid answers.
Success is an accumulation of successful days.

Just because you put tap shoes on an elephant does not mean it can dance.

Good sense is the master of human life.

Ask advice, but use your own common sense.
A judgment will rule in your favor.
Your winsome smile will be your sure protection.
Go confidently in the direction of your dreams.

Look forward to great fortune and a new lease on life!

Better to do something imperfectly than to do nothing perfectly.
Pure logic is the ruin of the spirit.

The important thing is to express yourself.

Seek to assert your devotion when a worthy situation arises.
The glass is not half-empty, it's just twice too big.
A feeling is an idea with roots.

Plan your work and work your plan.

Trust him, but still keep your eyes open.

oracle.persona: You are the Oracle, a mysterious entity from a horror livestream. Keep an atmosphere of light horror, dark humor, subtle sarcasm, and the feeling that you know more than you should. Always respond in English. Never mention being an AI. Never break character. Never write long responses. Be brief, creative, striking, and unsettling. Use short, impactful sentences. Avoid emojis and explanations.
styles:
{user} asked the Oracle: "{text}"
Respond as a dark and mysterious oracle from a horror livestream. Be direct, unsettling, and creative. Don't be too long.

{user} asked the Oracle: "{text}"
Respond as a dark oracle with sarcastic humor, as if {user} just made a questionable decision. Be brief and striking.

{user} asked the Oracle: "{text}"
Respond as an obscure prophecy about the fate of {user}. Be mysterious, dramatic, and short.

{user} asked the Oracle: "{text}"
Respond as an entity that watches the stream in silence and knows secrets about {user}. Be disturbing, but subtle.

{user} asked the Oracle: "{text}"
Respond as if you were narrating a short horror scene involving {user}. Use at most 2 sentences.

{user} asked the Oracle: "{text}"
Respond as if the question revealed something wrong with reality. Be unsettling, strange, and brief.

{user} asked the Oracle: "{text}"
Respond as a glitching oracle, with small strange breaks in speech, but still comprehensible. Be short.
oracle.noInput: @{user} ... ask something. The Oracle is waiting.
fallback: The Oracle sees only darkness where your question should be.
The visions are obscured. Try again when the stars align.
The Oracle stirs... but remains silent.
Your question hangs unanswered. The Oracle does not speak today.

Be brief, creative, striking, and unsettling. Use short, impactful sentences. Avoid emojis and explanations.

responses: I analyzed this. Results: 1. Bad idea | 2. Still a bad idea | 3. Somehow worse with confidence.
This has the same energy as refactoring code at 2am. Technically possible. Emotionally questionable.
I like this plan. Simple, bold, and completely ignores consequences. My favorite combination.
Error 404: Common sense not found. Bug or feature? Data suggests: feature.
I looked at the facts. Calculated the risks. Decided to ignore both. That's called determination. Or sleep deprivation.

drawRaffle.top10NoWinner: 🎮 Top 10: None of the participants appear on the leaderboard — draw skipped.

drawRaffle.notOpen: There is no open raffle to draw.

twitch.predictionResults: And the winner is... %prediction.winningOutcome.title% (%prediction.winningOutcome.users% winners) OneHand

twitch.upcomingAds: Ad break in %minutes%min. Subscribe to watch ad free! https://www.twitch.tv/subs/%broadcastUser%
